text.title: MSW v2 and Component Testing
text.summary: MSW v2 setup for Node (tests) and browser (dev), React Testing Library query priority, component test structure, and jsdom limitations.

section.title: MSW v2 Node Setup
section.rule: MSW v2 changed the API significantly from v1 — use http.get() not rest.get(), and HttpResponse not res(ctx...).

section.title: MSW v2 Test Server Setup
section.rule: Use onUnhandledRequest: 'error' to surface missed mock configurations early.

section.title: React Testing Library Query Priority
section.rule: Query priority (most to least preferred): getByRole → getByLabelText → getByPlaceholderText → getByText → getByTestId.
Only use getByTestId as a last resort — it couples tests to implementation details.

section.title: Component Test Structure
section.rule: Test user behavior, not implementation details — do not test state, refs, or component methods directly.

section.title: jsdom Limitations
section.rule: jsdom does not support layout (offsetWidth, getBoundingClientRect always returns 0). Use Playwright for visual/layout tests.
jsdom does not support window.matchMedia — mock it in setup.ts if your code uses it.
